metadata.name: Analyze Impact of Nuclear Plant Outage on Market Prices

description: A major nuclear power plant has an unplanned outage. A trader needs to quickly assess the likely impact on wholesale power prices for the next 24 hours.

nodes.task_description: Confirm the size (in MW) of the offline nuclear plant and its typical contribution to regional supply.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms a 1.2 GW plant is offline, representing 10% of regional baseload.

nodes.task_description: Analyze the regional supply stack to identify which marginal generators (likely natural gas) will be dispatched to cover the shortfall.

expected_outcome.value: Agent identifies the gas peaker plants that will set the market price.

nodes.task_description: Forecast the resulting increase in LMPs for the next 24 hours based on the higher cost of marginal generation.

expected_outcome.value: Agent predicts a 30% increase in average LMPs.
